summary: Time-stamped feedback on your video frm your team & AI. Free Discussion | Link
content: Eddie is your AI assistant editor - cutting raw footage into rough cuts. Eddie works with Claude and ChatGPT. And has extensions for Premiere, Resolve, and Final Cut. Interview cuts (with b-roll placement), scripted workflows, and multicam podcasts — plus the R3D, BRAW, and Sony native ingestion. Ask for stronger hooks, make your edits punchier and iterate seamlessly with Eddie. Then export to MP4 or polish it in Adobe, DaVinci Resolve, & FCP.
chineseSummary: 来自您的团队和人工智能的带时间戳的视频反馈。免费讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Eddie 是您的人工智能助理剪辑师 - 将原始素材剪辑成粗剪。 Eddie 与 Claude 和 ChatGPT 一起工作。并具有 Premiere、Resolve 和 Final Cut 的扩展。采访剪辑（带有幕后花絮位置）、脚本化工作流程和多机位播客 - 以及 R3D、BRAW 和索尼原生摄取。要求更强的挂钩，让您的编辑更有力，并与 Eddie 无缝迭代。然后导出为 MP4 或在 Adob​​e、DaVinci Resolve 和 FCP 中进行润色。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
